order_number.orig_str: शासन निर्णय क्रमांक: रासेयो २०२६/प्र. क्र.०७/ई-१५४०२१३/रासेयो कक्ष,

para_trans: Regarding the procurement of mementos for the state level awards for both the years of the National Service Scheme year 2029-22 and 2022-23 as well as the constitution of the Procurement Committee for the printing of certificates and brochures.
Department of Higher and Technical Education,
Government Decision Number: Rope 2026 / Q. No.07 / E-1540213 / Rope Room,
Mantralaya, Elphinstone Technical School Campus, 3, Municipal Road, Dhobi Lake, Mumbai-400 001.
Reference: - Industries, Power and Labour Department, Government Decision No: BHANKS-2014 / Q. No.82 / PART-1 / INDUSTRY-4,

Under the above-mentioned Government Decision, the Government was contemplating the purchase of mementos for the State Level National Service Scheme Awards for both the years 2021-22 b 2022-23 and the appointment of a Procurement Committee for the printing of Certificates B Introduction Book.

The Procurement Committee is being constituted as follows to facilitate the procurement process and to facilitate the administration in procuring mementos for the National Service Scheme Awards at the State level both in the year 2021-22 and 2022-23 and to facilitate the printing of certificates and identity cards.

The said Procurement Committee shall take appropriate action as prescribed in the Government Decision, No.Bhankhas-2014 / No.82 / Part- [] 1 / Industry-4, dated 01.12.2016 of the Department of Industries, Power and Labour, Ministry, Mumbai-400 032.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
table_trans: Joint Secretary / Deputy Secretary (National Service Scheme / Coordination)
